name: Mexican Spaghetti Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the pasta, then let it cool slightly.
2. Stir in butter, parmesan cheese, and eggs. Spread the mixture into the bottom of a large greased baking dish.
3. Brown the onion and ground beef together. Stir in kidney beans, undrained tomatoes, and tomato paste. Add chopped green chilis, chili flakes, sugar, and cumin.
4. Let the mixture simmer for at least 30 minutes or longer (you can add some Tabasco Sauce for extra "kick" at the end).
5. Pour the meat mixture over the pasta in the baking dish. Top with shredded cheese, olives, and tortilla chips.
6. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 30-40 minutes, or until brown.
